headline: Is GE’s (GE) Expanded Palantir AI Deal Quietly Redefining Its Long-Term Efficiency Narrative?
summary: In March 2026, GE Aerospace and Palantir Technologies expanded their multi-year partnership to roll out agentic AI across GE’s military aviation sustainment and broader production system, aiming to improve supply chain visibility, predict failures, and keep U.S. Air Force fleets mission-ready. By combining GE Aerospace’s engine and manufacturing expertise with Palantir’s AI platform, the collaboration turns complex maintenance and logistics data into automated, real-time workflows that could...
